t: Detecting sensitive content in media and providing intervention options
a: Alert people before displaying images or video that might be sensitive.
An object that indicates whether sensitive content is present and includes intervention guidance.
A type that identifies a category of sensitive content.
Configurations that represent the way the framework checks for sensitive content and how the app responds.
An indicator that the person requests overt detection of sensitive content.
An indicator that the app lacks access to use the framework.
An indicator that user preference requests discrete detection of sensitive content.
An object that analyzes media for sensitive content.
An object that checks if a video contains sensitive content and provides status updates.
A handler your app provides to receive video-stream analysis results.
An object that monitors a stream of video by analyzing frames for sensitive content.
Options for the different types of analyzed video streams.
An option that refers to a video stream from another device.
An option that refers to a video stream sent to another device.
Provide a safer experience in your app by detecting and alerting people to sensitive content in images and videos before displaying them.

t: Testing your app’s response to sensitive media
a: Trigger your app’s intervention flow by using a special QR code and profile that Apple provides for testing.
The results of the first detected sensitive video frame.
A handler that your app provides to react to sensitive content detection.
A stream your app uses to receive video-stream analysis results.
A property that determines if the app detects nudity and how the app responds.
Analyzes individual video-stream frames for sensitive content.
Analyzes an image for sensitive content and runs code on completion.
Analyzes an image file on disk at a URL and runs code on completion.
Analyzes a video file on disk at the given URL and runs the given code on completion.
Analyzes video frames for the given capture device input.
Analyzes video frames for the given decompression session.
Indicates that your app is ready to resume video stream analysis.
A property that contains the categories of sensitive content that analysis detects.
Stops stream analysis.
A content type that indicates the presence of graphic violence or gore.
Provides a result that indicates if the video file contains sensitive content.
Creates a sensitivity analyzer.
Creates a video stream analyzer for the given call participant and stream option.
Creates an analysis policy value from the enumeration’s underlying type.
Initializes a stream direction with the given raw value.
Creates a content type from a raw string value.
A Boolean value that indicates whether the checked content contains sensitive material.
An object that provides the app with status updates while a sensitive content check occurs for a video.
A content type that indicates the presence of nudity or sexually explicit material.
Intervention guidance that suggests the app indicate the presence of sensitive content.
Intervention guidance that suggests the app interrupt the video stream.
Intervention guidance that suggests the app mute the audio of the current video stream.
Analyzes a video file on disk at a URL for sensitive content.
